props.message:
THE MURK SENATE

A roundtable of seven walkers in the fog. They are arguing about settings nobody set, on a thing nobody can name, with consequences nobody can describe.

They have been at it for some time.

root.speaker: Senator Olm
root.text: The number wants to be lower. I have always said the number wants to be lower.

root.speaker: Senator Bethel
root.text: The number cannot be lower. Olm has been wrong about the number for a long time.

root.speaker: Senator Reska
root.text: The number must be considered carefully. We have been considering it carefully for some time.

root.speaker: Senator Pell
root.text: Friends, friends — perhaps the number is not the right question. Perhaps the right question is which of us last knew the question.

root.speaker: Senator Ulor
root.text: Pell is changing the subject again. Pell is always changing the subject. Khorgaul's grip, Pell.

root.speaker: Senator Velna
root.text: Move that we adjourn. ...Move that we have always adjourned. ...Move that we begin to consider a motion to perhaps adjourn.

root.speaker: Senator Marn
root.text: Walker — would you cast the deciding voice? ...No, I see, the question has shifted again. Never mind. Walk well.
